violations.description: Preventing contamination of packaged and unpackaged food. — --Raw animal food was not properly separated from raw or cooked ready-to-eat food. -Shelled Eggs stored above raw whole onions in the walk-in cooler.

Clean-in-place (CIP) equipment - Design and construction. — --Nonfood contact surface of clean in place equipment did not meet proper design and/or construction characteristics. -Walk-in cooler has water on the floor. Management is aware of the situation and has a tech called to service the cooler.
